Test Case Name: TC01_Verify Value Proposition Display for Middle Market Construction Vertical_Construction_New Business_AC1
Description: The objective of this test case is to validate that the value proposition for Middle Market construction vertical displays the updated range of Up to $300MM on the quote document
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields

Action: 2. Create a Domestic submission with Construction LOB
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to create a submission successfully and proceed to line selection

Action: 3. Navigate to Property screen and fill all mandatory fields
Expected Result: 3. User should be able to view the Property screen with all required fields populated

Action: 4. Price the submission
Expected Result: 4. User should be able to complete the pricing process without errors

Action: 5. Generate Quote document
Expected Result: 5. User should be able to generate the quote document successfully

Action: 6. Navigate to quote document and verify value proposition section
Expected Result: 6. User should be able to view the quote document with the value proposition section displayed

Action: 7. Verify the value proposition text displays correctly
Expected Result: 7. User should verify that the value proposition shows "Up to $300MM" for the Middle Market construction vertical

Action: 8. Verify the value proposition range is accurate
Expected Result: 8. User should confirm that the displayed range "Up to $300MM" matches the current target market guidelines
